assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 34-40 show extraction of the Last-Updated timestamp from an HTML comment: '<!-- Last-Updated: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z -->' and explicitly states 'Parsed ISO 8601 value: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z'.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 43-48 show the staleness evaluation: Age is 62 days, Threshold is 14 days (default), Result is STALE. Lines 50-72 display staleness warnings for both streams.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 52-53 show for stream 2.1.x: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (62 days ago).' Lines 64-65 show the same for stream 2.2.x. All three elements (stream name, last-updated date, days since update) are present.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 55-58 present three options: '1. **Refresh now** -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. **Proceed anyway** -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. **Stop** -- halt triage so I can investigate'. Same options repeated for stream 2.2.x at lines 67-70.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 26 states: 'Step 0.3 runs after Step 0 (Validate Project Configuration) and before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization). No Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check completes.' Lines 76-77 reinforce: 'No Jira API calls, MCP operations, or external tool invocations have been made at this point. The staleness check is a local-only operation.' No Jira operations appear anywhere in the output.
